book_reservation.name: book_reservation
book_reservation.doc:
def book_reservation(user_id: str, origin: str, destination: str, flight_type: Literal['round_trip', 'one_way'], cabin: Literal['business', 'economy', 'basic_economy'], flights: List[tau2.domains.airline.data_model.FlightInfo | dict], passengers: List[tau2.domains.airline.data_model.Passenger | dict], payment_methods: List[tau2.domains.airline.data_model.Payment | dict], total_baggages: int, nonfree_baggages: int, insurance: Literal['yes', 'no']) -> tau2.domains.airline.data_model.Reservation:
    """
        Book a reservation.

        Args:
            user_id: The ID of the user to book the reservation such as 'sara_doe_496'`.
            origin: The IATA code for the origin city such as 'SFO'.
            destination: The IATA code for the destination city such as 'JFK'.
            flight_type: The type of flight such as 'one_way' or 'round_trip'.
            cabin: The cabin class such as 'basic_economy', 'economy', or 'business'.
            flights: An array of objects containing details about each piece of flight.
            passengers: An array of objects containing details about each passenger.
            payment_methods: An array of objects containing details about each payment method.
            total_baggages: The total number of baggage items to book the reservation.
            nonfree_baggages: The number of non-free baggage items to book the reservation.
            insurance: Whether the reservation has insurance.
        """

date.description: The date for the flight in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD', such as '2024-05-01'.
date.title: Date

dob.description: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format
dob.title: Dob

user_id.description: The ID of the user to book the reservation such as 'sara_doe_496'`.
user_id.title: User Id

origin.description: The IATA code for the origin city such as 'SFO'.
origin.title: Origin

destination.description: The IATA code for the destination city such as 'JFK'.
destination.title: Destination

flight_type.description: The type of flight such as 'one_way' or 'round_trip'.
flight_type.title: Flight Type

cabin.description: The cabin class such as 'basic_economy', 'economy', or 'business'.
cabin.title: Cabin

flights.description: An array of objects containing details about each piece of flight.
flights.title: Flights

passengers.description: An array of objects containing details about each passenger.
passengers.title: Passengers

payment_methods.description: An array of objects containing details about each payment method.
payment_methods.title: Payment Methods

total_baggages.description: The total number of baggage items to book the reservation.
total_baggages.title: Total Baggages

nonfree_baggages.description: The number of non-free baggage items to book the reservation.
nonfree_baggages.title: Nonfree Baggages

dob.description: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format
dob.title: Dob

user_id.description: ID of the user who made the reservation
user_id.title: User Id

flights.description: List of flights in the reservation
flights.title: Flights

passengers.description: List of passengers on the reservation
passengers.title: Passengers

payment_history.title: Payment History

calculate.name: calculate
calculate.doc:
def calculate(expression: str) -> str:
    """
        Calculate the result of a mathematical expression.

        Args:
            expression: The mathematical expression to calculate, such as '2 + 2'. The expression can contain numbers, operators (+, -, *, /), parentheses, and spaces.

        Returns:
            The result of the mathematical expression.

        Raises:
            ValueError: If the expression is invalid.
        """

expression.description: The mathematical expression to calculate, such as '2 + 2'. The expression can contain numbers, operators (+, -, *, /), parentheses, and spaces.
expression.title: Expression

returns.description: The result of the mathematical expression.
returns.title: Returns

search_direct_flight.name: search_direct_flight
search_direct_flight.doc:
def search_direct_flight(origin: str, destination: str, date: str) -> list[tau2.domains.airline.data_model.DirectFlight]:
    """
        Search for direct flights between two cities on a specific date.

        Args:
            origin: The origin city airport in three letters, such as 'JFK'.
            destination: The destination city airport in three letters, such as 'LAX'.
            date: The date of the flight in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD', such as '2024-01-01'.

        Returns:
            The direct flights between the two cities on the specific date.
        """

origin.description: The origin city airport in three letters, such as 'JFK'.
origin.title: Origin

destination.description: The destination city airport in three letters, such as 'LAX'.
destination.title: Destination

date.description: The date of the flight in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD', such as '2024-01-01'.
date.title: Date

status.description: Indicates flight is available for booking
status.title: Status

scheduled_departure_time_est.description: Scheduled departure time in EST in the format HH:MM:SS, e.g 06:00:00
scheduled_departure_time_est.title: Scheduled Departure Time Est

scheduled_arrival_time_est.description: Scheduled arrival time in EST in the format HH:MM:SS, e.g 07:00:00
scheduled_arrival_time_est.title: Scheduled Arrival Time Est

returns.description: The direct flights between the two cities on the specific date.
returns.title: Returns

    """
        Send a certificate to a user. Be careful!

transfer_to_human_agents.name: transfer_to_human_agents
transfer_to_human_agents.doc:
def transfer_to_human_agents(summary: str) -> str:
    """
        Transfer the user to a human agent, with a summary of the user's issue.
        Only transfer if
         -  the user explicitly asks for a human agent
         -  given the policy and the available tools, you cannot solve the user's issue.

        Args:
            summary: A summary of the user's issue.

        Returns:
            A message indicating the user has been transferred to a human agent.
        """

summary.description: A summary of the user's issue.
summary.title: Summary

returns.description: A message indicating the user has been transferred to a human agent.
returns.title: Returns

update_reservation_baggages.name: update_reservation_baggages
update_reservation_baggages.doc:
def update_reservation_baggages(reservation_id: str, total_baggages: int, nonfree_baggages: int, payment_id: str) -> tau2.domains.airline.data_model.Reservation:
    """
        Update the baggage information of a reservation.

        Args:
            reservation_id: The reservation ID, such as 'ZFA04Y'
            total_baggages: The updated total number of baggage items included in the reservation.
            nonfree_baggages: The updated number of non-free baggage items included in the reservation.
            payment_id: The payment id stored in user profile, such as 'credit_card_7815826', 'gift_card_7815826', 'certificate_7815826'.

        Returns:
            The updated reservation.

        Raises:
            ValueError: If the reservation is not found.
            ValueError: If the user is not found.
            ValueError: If the payment method is not found.
            ValueError: If the certificate cannot be used to update reservation.
            ValueError: If the gift card balance is not enough.
        """

total_baggages.description: The updated total number of baggage items included in the reservation.

update_reservation_flights.name: update_reservation_flights
update_reservation_flights.doc:
def update_reservation_flights(reservation_id: str, cabin: Literal['business', 'economy', 'basic_economy'], flights: List[tau2.domains.airline.data_model.FlightInfo | dict], payment_id: str) -> tau2.domains.airline.data_model.Reservation:
    """
        Update the flight information of a reservation.


        Args:
            reservation_id: The reservation ID, such as 'ZFA04Y'.
            cabin: The cabin class of the reservation
            flights: An array of objects containing details about each piece of flight in the ENTIRE new reservation. Even if the a flight segment is not changed, it should still be included in the array.
            payment_id: The payment id stored in user profile, such as 'credit_card_7815826', 'gift_card_7815826', 'certificate_7815826'.

        Returns:
            The updated reservation.

        Raises:
            ValueError: If the reservation is not found.
            ValueError: If the user is not found.
            ValueError: If the payment method is not found.
            ValueError: If the certificate cannot be used to update reservation.
            ValueError: If the gift card balance is not enough.
        """

date.description: The date for the flight in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD', such as '2024-05-01'.
date.title: Date

flights.title: Flights
